column2: CAA Assessor Cannot Set Sail and OSO Requirements with Invalid/Incomplete Swarm-Aware SORA Evidence
column3: ['Log into the UAS operational authorization application as a CAA assessor. ', 'Provide invalid or incomplete swarm-aware SORA evidence for review. ', 'Attempt to set sail and OSO requirements based on the provided evidence. ']
column4: ['Successfully logged in as a CAA assessor. ', 'Invalid/incomplete swarm-aware SORA evidence is presented to the assessor. ', 'The CAA assessor cannot proceed with setting sail and OSO requirements due to the invalid or incomplete nature of the swarm-aware SORA evidence. ']
